message:
Major wizard overhaul and connector improvements

Wizard (pages/wizard.rs):
- Complete rewrite with improved UX flow
- Better state management
- Enhanced error handling
- New confirmation page

Connectors:
- ChatGPT: Improved parsing reliability
- Claude Code: Better session detection
- Codex: Enhanced format handling
- Cursor: Improved extraction
- Gemini: Better API response parsing

Tests:
- Expanded E2E pipeline coverage
- New wizard flow tests
